headline: Datadog, Inc. (DDOG) Initiated with $150 Price Target by Benchmark on AI Observability Strength
summary: Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG) is among the 13 Best Strong Buy AI Stocks to Invest In Now. On April 1, Benchmark initiated coverage of Datadog, Inc.
